articles.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: IPL 2026 Purple Cap: Kamboj Takes Lead, Klaasen Reclaims Orange Cap
articles.what_this_means: IPL 2026 saw major shake-ups on Saturday: Kamboj claimed the Purple Cap as top wicket-taker with stellar bowling, while Heinrich Klaasen recaptured the Orange Cap as leading run-scorer with aggressive batting. If you're watching from the US, catch full match highlights on ESPN+ or Willow TV, with YouTube clips available by afternoon.

articles.title: New Zealand Cricket 2026: Foxcroft's Brilliant 59 vs Bangladesh
articles.what_this_means: New Zealand batter Dean Foxcroft scored a brilliant 59 off 58 balls in his second ODI against Bangladesh in Dhaka, proving that smart cricket beats flashy cricket. His unbeaten innings was the turning point that led New Zealand to victory in challenging subcontinental conditions. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this match highlights the depth of international cricket beyond India-centric series.

articles.title: Shivaleeka Oberoi & Abhishek Pathak Welcome Baby Girl 2026
articles.what_this_means: Bollywood actor Shivaleeka Oberoi and director Abhishek Pathak welcomed their first child, a baby girl, on April 19, 2026, during the auspicious Akshaya Tritiya. The couple announced the joyful news on social media with heartfelt gratitude to their loved ones and fans.

articles.title: Tabu Buys ₹10 Crore Luxury Apartment in Mumbai 2026
articles.what_this_means: Tabu has invested ₹10 crores in a luxury apartment at Godrej Skyshore in Mumbai's Versova locality. This move reflects the financial success of top Bollywood actors and their commitment to premium real estate investments in India's entertainment capital.
